properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins.

properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key for signing JWT tokens.

properties.name: app.jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.cookie.secure
properties.description: Whether to set the Secure flag on cookies.

properties.name: app.frontend-url
properties.description: Frontend application URL for email links.

properties.name: app.email.resend-api-key
properties.description: API key for the Resend email service.
